content.summary: 全都cli Readwise (@readwise) Introducing the Readwise CLI. Anything you've saved in Readwise (highlights, articles, PDFs, books, youtube, newsletters) is now instantly accessible from the terminal. For you, and your AI agents. npm install -g @readwise/cli Video — https://nitter.net/readwise/status/2034302848805241282#m
